sections.heading: Full text
sections.text:
Supplementary Appropriation [No. 7 of 2009 41
GOVERNMENT OF ZAMBIA
ACT
No. 7 of 2009
Date of Assent: 31st March, 2009
An Act to confirm the supplementary expenditure of moneys
aggregating five hundred and forty eight billion, two
hundred and fifteen million, six hundred and fifteen
thousand, seven hundred and one kwacha required for the
services of the Republic during the financial year ended
on 31st December, 2007.
[3rd April, 2009
ENACTED by the Parliament of Zambia. Enactment
This Act may be cited as the Supplementary Appropriation Short title
(2007) Act, 2009.
On the authority of a warrant issued by the President, it is Supplementary
appropriation
hereby confirmed that there was expended from the general
revenues of the Republic, such moneys indicated in respect of the
services of the Republic specified in the third column of the
Schedule, being expenditure in excess of the moneys appropriated
for the services of the Republic by the Appropriation Act, 2007. Act No. 9 of
2007
Copies of this Act can be obtained from the Government Printer
P.O. Box 30136, 10101 Lusaka. Price K2,000 each.
